name: 4" x 6" Herringbone Tabletop Frame Gold/White - Threshold™: Modern Style, Easel Back, Glass
description:
Let this unique frame by Threshold™ displays your prized moments and fabulous adventures. The herringbone pattern adds artistic elegance to any space, with a subtle metallic glimmer that blends with any color palette.
